is_p_falciparum.evidence: Study of Plasmodium falciparum chloroquine resistance transporter (pfcrt) K76T mutation.

reports_target_markers.evidence: Reports Pfcrt codon 76 (K76T), a curated target position.

reports_extractable_frequencies.evidence: 'Fifty-one of the 56 pretreatment samples presented the T76 codon... giving an 85% prevalence'; Table 1 gives counts K76 vs T76 (5/50 vs 45/50).

sub_country_location.evidence: Study done in Manhiça (Maputo Province), a rural town in southern Mozambique; patients recruited at Manhiça District Hospital — single named sub-national site.

temporal_resolution_within_3y.evidence: Patients recruited over a 2-month period from May through July 1999 — well within 3 years.

african_field_samples.evidence: Fingerprick blood samples from symptomatic children attending Manhiça District Hospital, Mozambique.

is_primary_study.evidence: Primary in vivo clinical/molecular study of 56 enrolled children.

duplicate_risk.evidence: Routine field collection at Manhiça; conducted by Centro de Investigação em Saúde da Manhiça but no explicit statement of overlap with a larger dataset.

supplement.evidence: Frequencies and site given in main text and Table 1.

assessment.summary: Primary study in Manhiça, Maputo Province, Mozambique (May–July 1999) reporting pfcrt K76T prevalence in 56 pretreatment P. falciparum samples: 51/56 (85%) T76; Table 1 gives K76/T76 counts (45/50). Meets all criteria.
